articles.title: Solana Trader Turns $1,470 into $200,000 in Five-Minute Crypto Windfall
articles.description: A cryptocurrency trader managed to, in the span of just 5 minutes, turn just 9 Solana ($SOL) tokens worth around $1,470 into 1,238 SOL worth over $200,000, to secure a gain of 137x in little time. According to data shared by on-chain analysis service Lookonchain, the trader spent the 9 SOL tokens to buy 28.58 […]
